titleStmt.title: SII 26.277: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 277. (A.R. No. 262 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of land for a sandhi lamp to the temple of Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Tirukkachchūr in Śeṅguṉṟa-nāḍu in Kaḷattūrkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Śendāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyāṉ, an oil-monger of the same village. The land is stated to have been received by the Śivabrāhmaṇa Kāñchikkuṟi Śrīkaṇṭha-bhaṭṭaṉ Ēkaṁbiradēvaṉ of Bhāradvāja-gōtra who had right (of worship) in the temple, and four others of the group of Uḍaiyapiḷḷai, namely Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyār Ēkāmbiradēvar, Uḍaiyapiḷḷai and Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyār. It is stated that a few incomes from the land are to be enjoyed by the donor himself.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī rājarāja
devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa
maṇṭalattuk kaḷattūr koṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut
tirukkaccūr tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkku I
vūr vāṇiyaṉ centāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ tiruvāla
kkoyiluṭaiyāṉ vaitta canti viḷakku 1 kku Ikko
yilil kāṇiyuṭaiya civabrāhmaṇaṉ bhāradvāja kādvikku
ṟi śrīkaṇṭabhaṭṭaṉ Ekāmpiratevaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷaikalil
tiruvekampamuṭaiyārum Ēkāmpiratevarum Uṭaiyapiḷ
ḷaiyum tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyārum kaikkoṇṭa nilam pa
miyaṉ kaḻaṉit tiruvālaperuñceṟuvil meṟkaṭaiya kuḻi 100 3 10
m Aiñcu paṭṭiyil meṟkaṭaiya kuḻi 5 10 4 Āka patinaṟu cāṇ
kālāl kuḻi 100 8 10 4 Innilattālvanta kaṭamaiyum I
ṟuttu Iṟaiyilā pattukku Ivviḷakku cantirā
tittavarai Erikkakkaṭavomākavum Innilattā
lvanta Āḷcoṟu cilvari vāṇikaṉe pe[kka ]
kkaṭavarākavum cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭu
ttom Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmāhe
śvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
